title: Jappafied Aethers
description: Jappa textures all over the Aether!
body:
![This is an image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/959532407126634547/970744726875672606/JappafiedAetherBanner.png)

Jappafied Aether is a Resource pack that aims to redo the looks of the Aether mods to fit the new style of textures, maintained by Aerod and BrianIsBro. As of now, the pack only takes care of the Aether I textures, while Aether II - Highlands textures are being worked on which you can try out by downloading the beta version from the GitHub page. The pack works as a solid Jappa texture backport, supports all versions of Aether I's textures which you can access by going into the “optional” folder in the pack and also updates the looks of various Aether addons.

**Terms of Usage:**

You are more than welcome to use our pack wherever you want, just make sure you’ll credit us somewhere.
If you'd like to use our assets in your other projects, make sure to let us know about it. You are also allowed to make your own edit/addon to the pack under these conditions:
- Your pack must have "Jappafied Aether" in it's name, e.g. "Aerod's Jappafied Aether Edit", or "Jappafied Aether - Sample addon".
- Your pack must not redistribute any original unedited Jappafied Aether assets in it, so you have to download Jappafied Aether at first to use it as a base for your pack.
- You have to credit us (Aerod and BrianIsBro) somewhere in the pack.
